segments.text: Praise God in his sanctuary; praise him in his mighty heavens.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise him for his acts of power; praise him for his surpassing greatness.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise him with the sounding of the trumpet, praise him with the harp and lyre.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise him with timbrel and dancing, praise him with the strings and pipe.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise him with the clash of cymbals, praise him with resounding cymbals.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let everything that has breath praise the Lord.
segments.speaker: Psalmist
